name: Baked Oysters with Bread Crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over moderate heat.
2. When foam subsides, add bread crumbs and garlic. Toss for 2-3 minutes or until the mixture is crisp and golden.
3. Stir in parsley and grated cheese.
4. Place oysters on the half-shell in a single layer on a shallow baking pan.
5. Sprinkle crumbs on the oysters.
6. Dot with small pieces of the remaining butter.
7. Bake in the top third of a preheated 425°F oven for 12-15 minutes or until crumbs are golden and juices are bubbling in the pan.
8. Serve immediately as an appetizer or first course.
